task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus using the administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or interface indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile icon, main navigation menu).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Organization Details or Company Details settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Admin' or 'Setup' section being active, specifically on a page titled 'Organization Details', 'Company Details', or similar branding settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the organization name was set to 'Initrode Global'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Initrode Global' entered into the Organization Name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the organization address was updated to the specified location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text '4120 Freidrich Ln, Suite 100, Austin, TX 78744' entered into the address text area or corresponding address fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the organization email and phone number were updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'support@initrode.com' in the email input field and '512-555-0199' in the phone input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the corporate logo was uploaded from the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file upload dialog showing the selection of 'initrode_logo.png' from the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or the new logo appearing in the logo preview area of the settings page.

task_completion.description: Verify the branding changes were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save' button being clicked, a success message/toast indicating the settings were updated, or the new values persisting on the page after saving.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual ServiceDesk Plus web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus interface, not terminal commands (like curl) or database scripts modifying the backend directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Elements/Inspector tab) open and modifying the DOM to artificially display the expected text or image.

integrity.description: Ensure the logo was uploaded via the application's intended mechanism.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the OS file picker dialog or the application's native file upload interface being used, rather than just dragging an image into a text editor or modifying the image source URL directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected organization name is 'Initrode Global'. The expected address is '4120 Freidrich Ln, Suite 100, Austin, TX 78744'. The expected email is 'support@initrode.com'. The expected phone number is '512-555-0199'. The logo must be uploaded from the local file path '/home/ga/Documents/initrode_logo.png'.
